title: Monday.com Service form submissions not showing the person who submitted it. Showing that someone within the service account submitted it instead.
excerpt: Right now, if a person submits a ticket through the Service Portal AND they do not have a monday.com or monday.com service account, the form submission will look like it was submitted by the person within the monday.com …

posts.author: gabem (Gabe)
posts.cookedHtml: Right now, if a person submits a ticket through the Service Portal AND they do not have a monday.com or monday.com service account, the form submission will look like it was submitted by the person within the monday.com service account that copied the form link to the portal. This causes confusion cause it looks like someone is submitting all the tickets even though it is different people each time. Especially in our use case because we are setting up the portal for people to use that are not within monday.com and will never be within monday.com service.
